import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/RoleSelection.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/RoleSelection.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useNavigate } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react-router.js?v=d6d2548b";
import { Shield, Building2, CheckCircle2, UserCheck } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
import { useApp } from "/src/app/contexts/AppContext.tsx";
const roles = [
  {
    id: "platform-admin",
    title: "Platform Admin",
    description: "System layer control center",
    subtitle: "Controls AI, policy engine, tenants, security, audit",
    icon: Shield,
    buttonText: "Enter Platform",
    route: "/platform-admin",
    gradient: "from-teal-600 to-teal-500"
  },
  {
    id: "org-admin",
    title: "Org Admin",
    description: "Manages organisation workspace",
    subtitle: "Customises policies for facility",
    icon: Building2,
    buttonText: "Enter Organisation",
    route: "/org-admin",
    gradient: "from-blue-600 to-blue-500"
  },
  {
    id: "compliance-manager",
    title: "Compliance Manager",
    description: "Review & approve documents",
    subtitle: "Ensures compliance, tracks audits",
    icon: CheckCircle2,
    buttonText: "Enter Compliance",
    route: "/compliance-manager",
    gradient: "from-orange-600 to-orange-500"
  },
  {
    id: "staff-user",
    title: "Staff",
    description: "Read approved documents",
    subtitle: "Follow policies, complete tasks",
    icon: UserCheck,
    buttonText: "Enter Workspace",
    route: "/staff",
    gradient: "from-purple-600 to-purple-500"
  }
];
export default function RoleSelection() {
  _s();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const { setCurrentUser } = useApp();
  const handleRoleSelect = (role) => {
    if (role.route !== "#") {
      setCurrentUser({
        id: "1",
        name: role.title,
        email: `${role.id.replace("-user", "")}@policynest.com`,
        role: role.id.replace("-user", ""),
        organizationName: role.id === "platform-admin" ? "PolicyNest Platform" : "Acme Healthcare"
      });
      navigate(role.route);
    }
  };

_c = RoleSelection;
var _c;

  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/RoleSelection.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/RoleSelection.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}
